name: Imagine Swimming (Upper West Side)
address: 752 West End Ave, New York, NY 10025
pricing: $48/class (Parent & Me); Baby Splash free for 8wk-4mo
description: Premier swim school offering Parent & Me classes for ages 4mo-3yr in a dedicated UWS pool facility, with curriculum emphasizing comfort, safety, and basic water skills through music and movement.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 15 min (1 train or bus up to 96th/Broadway)

name: Goldfish Swim School (Upper East Side)
pricing: $50 annual membership fee per child; lesson pricing via enrollment portal (promo: $0 membership with code SPLASH26)
description: Year-round swim lessons for ages 4mo-12yr using their Science of SwimPlay curriculum with a 4:1 student-to-teacher ratio in a warm, kid-friendly pool.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 20 min (crosstown bus M79 + short walk, or M86 crosstown)

name: The Little Gym (Upper West Side)
pricing: Membership-based; covers 1-2 classes/week (contact for current rates)
description: Progressive parent-child gymnastics program starting at 4 months, growing through Pre-K with focus on balance, coordination, and confidence in a structured, non-competitive environment.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 5 min (2 blocks north on Broadway)

name: NYC Elite Gymnastics (Upper West Side)
pricing: Contact for current semester/drop-in pricing
description: Manhattan's premier recreational and competitive gymnastics program for 20+ years, offering 50-minute parent-child obstacle course classes for toddlers from 3 months with swinging, climbing, running, and jumping.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 15 min (walk west to Riverside, then south)

name: Chelsea Piers Toddler Gym & Field House
hours: Toddler Gym drop-in: Mon-Thu 9am-noon & 1-5pm; Fri 9am-noon; Sat-Sun varies
pricing: Drop-in ~$20 for toddler sessions; up to $65 for premium classes
description: Massive waterfront sports complex with a dedicated Toddler Gym for ages 6mo-4yr featuring climbing structures, slides, and sensory equipment, plus structured gymnastics and basketball classes for ages 2-3.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 30 min (1 train to 23rd St + walk west to piers)

name: NY Kids Club (68th Street / Upper West Side)
pricing: Contact for class package pricing; drop-in options available
category: Multi-activity (Music, Art, Gym, Dance, Cooking, STEM, Yoga)
description: Custom-built enrichment center near Lincoln Center with four classrooms and a gym featuring a 20ft trampoline, offering music, art, gym, dance, cooking, STEM, and sports classes for ages 2mo-12yr.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 10 min (1 train south to 66th St/Lincoln Center)

name: Color Me Mine (Upper West Side)
pricing: Mini Mondays: $5 studio fee for ages 5 and under; regular studio fee + price of ceramic piece
open_play_vs_classes: Open play (drop-in, paint at your own pace)
description: Drop-in paint-your-own pottery studio where toddlers choose a ceramic piece and paint with provided supplies; staff handles glazing and kiln firing. Mini Mondays offer $5 studio fees for young kids.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 10 min (short walk south on Amsterdam or 1 train to 66th)

name: Children's Museum of Manhattan (CMOM)
pricing: $14 adults & children; $11 seniors 65+; free under 1yr; drop-in programs free with admission
open_play_vs_classes: Both (8+ daily drop-in programs free with admission; registered semester classes $420-$2,700)
description: Interactive children's museum steps from 79th/Broadway offering 8+ free daily drop-in art, science, and sensory classes with museum admission, plus registered early childhood programs in art, science, and Spanish.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 5 min walk (4 blocks north on Broadway)

name: Little Maestros
pricing: Contact for current rates; drop-in available via KidPass
description: Award-winning 24-year-old infant and toddler music program (Nickelodeon Parents Pick winner) featuring original interactive activities, musical storytime, puppet shows, language development, and dance parties in 45-min sessions.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 25 min (1 train to 72nd, crosstown bus M72, or subway + walk)

name: Yogi Beans
address: 1018 Lexington Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10021
pricing: ~$35/class (via CourseHorse); contact for packages
description: The largest kids-only yoga studio on the Upper East Side, offering Mini Sun Salutation and Me & My Bean toddler yoga classes with musical instruments, fun props, and nature-inspired flows for ages 2+.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 25 min (1 train to 72nd, walk east or M72 crosstown bus)

name: Super Soccer Stars (Upper West Side)
address: 606 Columbus Ave, Floor 2, New York, NY 10024 (office); classes at The Jewish Center, 131 W 86th St and other UWS venues
hours: Mon-Sun 9:00am-6:00pm; class times vary by location
pricing: Contact for current semester pricing; ~$40-50/class typical
description: Nationally recognized toddler soccer program offering Adult & Me classes for ages 12-26 months and Soccer for 2-3s in 40-45 minute sessions with max 8-10 children and experienced coaches using puppet characters Mimi and Pepe.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 8 min (walk north to 86th St venues)

name: SocRoc NYC
address: Various Manhattan park and gym locations (no single HQ); classes throughout UWS, UES, and other neighborhoods
hours: Weekday and weekend classes; schedule varies by location
pricing: $35-$48/child per class in Manhattan; $44.95 annual enrollment fee; code EARLYBIRD for 10% off
description: Grown-Up & Me soccer classes for ages 18mo-3yr held at parks, playgrounds, and gyms across Manhattan neighborhoods, with a parent/caregiver participating alongside the child.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: Varies by location; many UWS classes within 10-15 min

name: Crossbar
hours: Toddler open play: weekdays 9:00am-12:00pm; class times vary
pricing: Contact (212) 652-2238 for class and open play pricing
open_play_vs_classes: Both (daily toddler open play + hosted soccer classes from Super Soccer Stars, Manhattan Soccer Club, etc.)
description: UWS soccer-themed venue with a mini indoor field hosting daily toddler open play (9am-noon weekdays) with soccer balls and toys, plus structured soccer classes for ages 2-7 through partner programs in a climate-controlled environment.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 8 min walk (7 blocks north on Broadway to 86th)

name: PLAYDAY (Upper West Side)
hours: Grown Up & Me sessions: Mon-Fri 10:00am & 11:15am; after-school and weekend hours vary
pricing: Contact for current drop-in and package pricing
description: Drop-in children's art studio offering 90-minute Grown Up & Me Art & Sensory Experience for ages 1-4 with activities based on children's literary favorites, focusing on motor skill and cognitive development through color exploration and discovery.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 5 min walk (a few blocks north on Amsterdam)

name: Kids at Art
address: 1412 2nd Ave (between E 73rd & 74th St), New York, NY 10021
pricing: Contact for current class pricing
description: Premier UES art studio running 25+ years, offering creative art classes for ages 2-12 in painting, drawing, sculpture, fashion design, and more in small non-competitive class settings that nurture imagination.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 25 min (1 train to 72nd + walk east, or M72 crosstown bus)

name: Bilingual Birdies
address: 120 Wall St, Floor 18, New York, NY 10005 (HQ); classes at Riverside Park/UWS, libraries, and various Manhattan venues
hours: 45-min classes; morning and afternoon sessions; schedule varies by location
pricing: Contact (646) 443-1313 for current class pricing
description: Fun language-learning program for families with children up to age 6, teaching Spanish, French, or Mandarin through 45 minutes of live music, dancing, and puppetry led by native-speaking certified educators, with classes held at Riverside Park and other UWS locations.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 5-15 min to UWS/Riverside Park class locations

name: Church Street School for Music and Art
pricing: Contact for current tuition rates
description: Non-profit community arts school in Tribeca (est. 1990) offering award-winning toddler music-and-art classes from 16 months, combining Dalcroze eurythmics-based music with art to encourage bonding and social skill development.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 30 min (1/2/3 train to Chambers St)

name: 14th Street Y
hours: Classes throughout the week; open play 8x/week for members
pricing: Trial class $17; 5-class card $65 members / $80 non-members; members get free open play and select classes
open_play_vs_classes: Both (open play for members + semester/drop-in classes)
description: East Village community center offering Toddler Play & Learn, Baby & Me Yoga, Baby & Me Barre, Messy Art & Play, and developmental movement classes for ages 1-3, with free open play 8x/week for members.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 30 min (1/2/3 train to 14th St)

name: Children's Tumbling
pricing: Private 50min $90; semi-private (2 kids) $75/child; semi-private (3 kids) $65/child
description: Lower Manhattan's premier gymnastics center since 1978, offering creative tumbling classes from age 16 months where toddlers climb mats, swing on trapeze and rings, jump on trampolines, and learn basic tumbling.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 35 min (1/2/3 train to Chambers St)

name: Apple Seeds (Oval Kids at Stuyvesant Town)
pricing: Red Apple membership $75/month (+tax) for unlimited playground access; drop-in available
open_play_vs_classes: Both (open play + 100+ classes/week across Apple Seeds network)
category: Multi-activity (Play space, Art, Music, Cooking, Dance, Science)
description: All-in-one indoor play space for families with children newborn to 5, featuring soft climbing areas, an NYC apartment with slide, taxi cab, play deli, Lego table, and shape sorter garden, plus a full schedule of toddler classes.
travel_time_from_79_broadway: 35 min (1 train to 14th St, L train to 1st Ave, walk)
